@props(['frame']) @php if ($class = $frame->class()) { $source = $class; if ($previous = $frame->previous()) { $source .= $previous->operator(); $source .= $previous->callable(); $source .= '('.implode(', ', $previous->args()).')'; } } else { $source = $frame->source(); } @endphp <x-laravel-exceptions-renderer::syntax-highlight :code="$source" language="php" truncate class="text-xs min-w-0" data-tippy-content="{{ $source }}" />
